{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国}}, and held the rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} (skipped ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of rank and exiled== See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑}} == References == {{reflist|2}} [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|[[Category:nowiki former closing]]'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} ...[[Category:nowiki former closing]] 5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 [[Category:January]][[Category:Search created pages]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]] 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]][[Category:nowiki former closing]] and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous rank of ...[[Category:nowiki former closing]] 7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 [[Category:January]][[Category:Search created pages]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] 2025 [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} (skipped ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}}; revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国}}, and held the rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} (skipped ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑}} == References == {{reflist|2}} [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 [[Category:January]][[Category:Search created pages]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]] 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 [[Category:January]][[Category:Search created pages]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] 2025 [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国}}, and held the rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} (skipped ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑}} == References == {{reflist|2}} [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 [[Category:January]][[Category:Search created pages]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]]2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 [[Category:January]][[Category:Search created pages]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] 2025 [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:New]]

However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|12=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|12=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} (skipped ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|12=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|12=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|12=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|12=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|12=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Search created pages]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] }} [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|12=draft}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|12=draft}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|12=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|12=draft}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|12=draft}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=draft}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|12=draft}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|12=draft}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|12=draft}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|12=draft}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=draft}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|12=draft}}, and held the rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=draft}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|12=draft}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|12=draft}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|12=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|12=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|12=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|12=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|12=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|12=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|12=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|12=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|12=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|12=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|12=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} (skipped ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|12=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|12=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|12=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|12=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|12=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Search created pages]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] }} [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|12=draft}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|12=draft}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|12=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|12=draft}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|12=draft}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=draft}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|12=draft}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|12=draft}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|12=draft}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|12=draft}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=draft}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|12=draft}}, and held the rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=draft}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|12=draft}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|12=draft}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|12=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|12=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|12=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|12=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|12=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|12=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|12=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|12=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|12=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|12=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|12=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} (skipped ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|12=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|12=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|12=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|12=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|12=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Search created pages]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]]

He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=draft|12=draft}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|12=draft|12=draft}}, and held the rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft|12=draft}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft|12=draft}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|12=draft|12=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|12=draft|12=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|12=draft|12=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|12=draft|12=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=draft|12=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft|12=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|12=draft|12=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=draft|12=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|12=draft|12=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=draft|12=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=draft|12=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft|12=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} (skipped ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft|12=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft|12=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft|12=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|12=draft|12=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft|12=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft|12=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|12=draft|12=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|12=draft|12=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}; He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=draft|12=draft}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|12=draft|12=draft}}, and held the rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft|12=draft}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft|12=draft}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|12=draft|12=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|12=draft|12=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|12=draft|12=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|12=draft|12=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=draft|12=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft|12=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|12=draft|12=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=draft|12=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|12=draft|12=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=draft|12=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=draft|12=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|12=draft|12=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|12=draft|12=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|12=draft|12=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|12=draft|12=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=draft|12=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft|12=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|12=draft|12=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=draft|12=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|12=draft|12=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=draft|12=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=draft|12=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft|12=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} (skipped ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft|12=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft|12=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft|12=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|12=draft|12=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft|12=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}; revision.comment: Text replacement - "rank" to "Rank"
revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|12=draft|12=draft}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|12=draft|12=draft}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=draft|12=draft}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|12=draft|12=draft}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|12=draft|12=draft}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=draft|12=draft}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|12=draft|12=draft}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft|12=draft}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft|12=draft}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft|12=draft}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|12=draft|12=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|12=draft|12=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|12=draft|12=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|12=draft|12=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=draft|12=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft|12=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|12=draft|12=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=draft|12=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|12=draft|12=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|12=draft|12=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=draft|12=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=draft|12=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft|12=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=draft|12=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=draft|12=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=draft|12=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|12=draft|12=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft|12=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=draft|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=draft|12=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|12=draft|12=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|12=draft|12=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft|12=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|12=draft|12=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of Rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|12=draft|12=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|12=draft|12=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous Rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]]

However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of Rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous Rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]]
