revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of Rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous Rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]]

revision.comment: 15 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:多治比三宅麻呂 up to rev 100045773
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 多治比三宅麻呂 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[飛鳥時代]]後期 - [[奈良時代]]前期 | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[正四位|正四位上]]・[[弁官|左大弁]] | 主君 = [[文武天皇]]→[[元明天皇]]→[[元正天皇]] | 氏族 = [[多治比氏|多治比]]公→多治比[[真人]] | 父母 = 父：多治比古王（丹比麻呂）
母：大伴比羅夫娘 | 兄弟 = [[多治比嶋|嶋]]、'''三宅麻呂'''、比夜部 | 妻 = | 子 = | 特記事項 = }} '''多治比 三宅麻呂'''（たじひ の みやけまろ）は、[[飛鳥時代]]後期から[[奈良時代]]前期にかけての[[貴族]]。[[摂津国#摂津職|摂津大夫]]・多治比古王の子。[[官位]]は[[正四位|正四位上]]・[[弁官|左大弁]]。 == 経歴 == [[東山道]][[巡察使 (古代日本)|巡察使]]を経て、[[慶雲]]元年（[[704年]]）[[従六位|従六位上]]から三階昇進して[[従五位|従五位下]]に[[叙爵]]。慶雲4年（[[707年]]）[[文武天皇]]の[[崩御]]に際して[[装束司|御装束司]]を務める。 [[元明天皇|元明朝]]では、[[鋳銭司|催鋳銭司]]・造[[雑物]]法用司が初めて設置されるとその[[官人]]に任ぜられる一方、[[和銅]]4年（[[711年]]）[[正五位|正五位上]]、和銅6年（[[713年]]）[[従四位|従四位下]]と[[弁官]]を務めながら順調に昇進し、元明朝末の和銅8年（[[715年]]）従四位上・左大弁に叙任される。 [[元正天皇|元正朝]]でも、[[民部省|民部卿]]・[[河内国]][[按察使 (日本)摂官]]など歴任し、[[養老]]3年（[[719年]]）[[正四位|正四位下]]、養老5年（[[721年]]）正四位上と順調に昇進を続ける。また同年[[参議]]に任ぜられたともされ、参議任官が事実であれば、既に[[大納言]]・[[多治比池守]]がいた[[多治比氏]]は[[藤原氏]]に続いて一族から同時に複数の議政官を出したことになる。しかし、翌養老6年（[[722年]]）[[謀反]]を誣告したとして罪を得て、[[斬首刑|斬刑]]に処せられるところを[[皇太子]]・首皇子（のち[[聖武天皇]]）の奏請によって[[恩赦|減刑]]されて[[伊豆国]]への[[流罪]]となった『[[続日本紀]]』養老6年正月20日条。この誣告事件について、当時[[右大臣]]として実質的に[[太政官]]の首班に立っていた[[長屋王]]が、[[藤原四兄弟]]と政治路線の違いが顕在化しつつある中で、長屋王に反発していた新任参議の三宅麻呂を除いて、代わりに親交のある[[阿倍広庭]]（一説では長屋王の舅）を議政官に加えることで、少しでも太政官運営の円滑化を図ろうとしたという、策謀の結果とする見方もある[[木本好信]]「藤原麻呂の前半生について : 長屋王の変前夜まで」『甲子園短期大学紀要』No. 28、[[甲子園短期大学]]、2010年3月。{{CRID|1390852193460906624 }}。。 一説では、[[神亀]]2年（[[725年]]）6月22日配所で卒去。享年73『皇胤志』。 == 官歴 == ※ 注記のないものは『[[続日本紀]]』による。 * 時期不詳：[[従六位|従六位上]] * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]3年（[[703年]]） 正月2日：[[東山道]][[巡察使 (古代日本)|巡察使]] * 大宝4年（[[704年]]） 正月7日：[[従五位|従五位下]]（越階） * 時期不詳：[[従五位|従五位上]] * 慶雲4年（[[707年]]） 10月3日：[[装束司|御装束司]]（[[文武天皇]]崩御） * [[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]） 2月11日：[[鋳銭司|催鋳銭司]] * 和銅2年（[[709年]]） 3月23日：造[[雑物]]法用司 * 時期不詳：[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[弁官|左中弁]]『[[多胡碑]]』碑文による。 * 和銅4年（[[711年]]） 4月7日：[[正五位|正五位上]] * 和銅6年（[[713年]]） 正月23日：[[従四位|従四位下]] * 和銅8年（[[715年]]） 正月10日：[[従四位|従四位上]]。5月22日：[[弁官|左大弁]] * [[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]） 9月：[[民部省|民部卿]]『[[公卿補任]]』 * [[養老]]3年（[[719年]]） 正月13日：[[正四位|正四位下]]。9月8日：[[河内国]][[按察使 (日本)|摂官]] * 養老5年（[[721年]]） 正月5日：[[正四位|正四位上]]。この年[[参議]]に任ぜられたか? * 養老6年（[[722年]]） 正月20日：流罪により官位剥奪 == 系譜 == * 父：[[多治比古王]] * 母：大伴比羅夫の娘 * 妻：不詳 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == *[[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 （中）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年。 * [[宝賀寿男]] 編著『古代氏族系譜集成』上中下、古代氏族研究会、1986年。{{国立国会図書館書誌ID|000001831027}}。 == 関連項目 == * [[多胡碑]] {{DEFAULTSORT:たしひ の みやけまろ}} [[Category:多治比氏|みやけまろ]] [[Category:飛鳥時代の人物]] [[Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:7世紀生]] [[Category:8世紀没]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[多治比三宅麻呂]] to [[Tajihi no Mikemaro]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 多治比三宅麻呂 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[飛鳥時代]]後期 - [[奈良時代]]前期 | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[正四位|正四位上]]・[[弁官|左大弁]] | 主君 = [[文武天皇]]→[[元明天皇]]→[[元正天皇]] | 氏族 = [[多治比氏|多治比]]公→多治比[[真人]] | 父母 = 父：多治比古王（丹比麻呂）
母：大伴比羅夫娘 | 兄弟 = [[多治比嶋|嶋]]、'''三宅麻呂'''、比夜部 | 妻 = | 子 = | 特記事項 = }} '''多治比 三宅麻呂'''（たじひ の みやけまろ）は、[[飛鳥時代]]後期から[[奈良時代]]前期にかけての[[貴族]]。[[摂津国#摂津職|摂津大夫]]・多治比古王の子。[[官位]]は[[正四位|正四位上]]・[[弁官|左大弁]]。 == 経歴 == [[東山道]][[巡察使 (古代日本)|巡察使]]を経て、[[慶雲]]元年（[[704年]]）[[従六位|従六位上]]から三階昇進して[[従五位|従五位下]]に[[叙爵]]。慶雲4年（[[707年]]）[[文武天皇]]の[[崩御]]に際して[[装束司|御装束司]]を務める。 [[元明天皇|元明朝]]では、[[鋳銭司|催鋳銭司]]・造[[雑物]]法用司が初めて設置されるとその[[官人]]に任ぜられる一方、[[和銅]]4年（[[711年]]）[[正五位|正五位上]]、和銅6年（[[713年]]）[[従四位|従四位下]]と[[弁官]]を務めながら順調に昇進し、元明朝末の和銅8年（[[715年]]）従四位上・左大弁に叙任される。 [[元正天皇|元正朝]]でも、[[民部省|民部卿]]・[[河内国]][[按察使 (日本)摂官]]など歴任し、[[養老]]3年（[[719年]]）[[正四位|正四位下]]、養老5年（[[721年]]）正四位上と順調に昇進を続ける。また同年[[参議]]に任ぜられたともされ、参議任官が事実であれば、既に[[大納言]]・[[多治比池守]]がいた[[多治比氏]]は[[藤原氏]]に続いて一族から同時に複数の議政官を出したことになる。しかし、翌養老6年（[[722年]]）[[謀反]]を誣告したとして罪を得て、[[斬首刑|斬刑]]に処せられるところを[[皇太子]]・首皇子（のち[[聖武天皇]]）の奏請によって[[恩赦|減刑]]されて[[伊豆国]]への[[流罪]]となった『[[続日本紀]]』養老6年正月20日条。この誣告事件について、当時[[右大臣]]として実質的に[[太政官]]の首班に立っていた[[長屋王]]が、[[藤原四兄弟]]と政治路線の違いが顕在化しつつある中で、長屋王に反発していた新任参議の三宅麻呂を除いて、代わりに親交のある[[阿倍広庭]]（一説では長屋王の舅）を議政官に加えることで、少しでも太政官運営の円滑化を図ろうとしたという、策謀の結果とする見方もある[[木本好信]]「藤原麻呂の前半生について : 長屋王の変前夜まで」『甲子園短期大学紀要』No. 28、[[甲子園短期大学]]、2010年3月。{{CRID|1390852193460906624 }}。。 一説では、[[神亀]]2年（[[725年]]）6月22日配所で卒去。享年73『皇胤志』。 == 官歴 == ※ 注記のないものは『[[続日本紀]]』による。 * 時期不詳：[[従六位|従六位上]] * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]3年（[[703年]]） 正月2日：[[東山道]][[巡察使 (古代日本)|巡察使]] * 大宝4年（[[704年]]） 正月7日：[[従五位|従五位下]]（越階） * 時期不詳：[[従五位|従五位上]] * 慶雲4年（[[707年]]） 10月3日：[[装束司|御装束司]]（[[文武天皇]]崩御） * [[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]） 2月11日：[[鋳銭司|催鋳銭司]] * 和銅2年（[[709年]]） 3月23日：造[[雑物]]法用司 * 時期不詳：[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[弁官|左中弁]]『[[多胡碑]]』碑文による。 * 和銅4年（[[711年]]） 4月7日：[[正五位|正五位上]] * 和銅6年（[[713年]]） 正月23日：[[従四位|従四位下]] * 和銅8年（[[715年]]） 正月10日：[[従四位|従四位上]]。5月22日：[[弁官|左大弁]] * [[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]） 9月：[[民部省|民部卿]]『[[公卿補任]]』 * [[養老]]3年（[[719年]]） 正月13日：[[正四位|正四位下]]。9月8日：[[河内国]][[按察使 (日本)|摂官]] * 養老5年（[[721年]]） 正月5日：[[正四位|正四位上]]。この年[[参議]]に任ぜられたか? * 養老6年（[[722年]]） 正月20日：流罪により官位剥奪 == 系譜 == * 父：[[多治比古王]] * 母：大伴比羅夫の娘 * 妻：不詳 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == *[[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 （中）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年。 * [[宝賀寿男]] 編著『古代氏族系譜集成』上中下、古代氏族研究会、1986年。{{国立国会図書館書誌ID|000001831027}}。 == 関連項目 == * [[多胡碑]] {{DEFAULTSORT:たしひ の みやけまろ}} [[Category:多治比氏|みやけまろ]] [[Category:飛鳥時代の人物]] [[Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:7世紀生]] [[Category:8世紀没]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of Rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous Rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] {{translated page|ja|多治比三宅麻呂|version=100045773|comment=Imported full ja history}}

It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of Rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous Rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{translated page|ja|多治比三宅麻呂|version=100045773|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]]}} [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]]

However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of Rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous Rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{translated page|ja|多治比三宅麻呂|version=100045773|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]]}} [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 6 (713), 1st Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Wadō 8 (715), 1st Month, 10th Day: {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 5th Month, 22nd Day: {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 (717), 9th Month: {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft}}『{{ill|Kugyō Bunin|ja|Kugyō補任|qq=draft|qq=draft}}』 * Yōrō 3 (719), 1st Month, 13th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; 9th Month, 8th Day: {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * Yōrō 5 (721), 1st Month, 5th Day: {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; possibly appointed as {{ill|Sangi|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft}}? * Yōrō 6 (722), 1st Month, 20th Day: Stripped of Rank and exiled == See Also == * {{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == {{reflist|2}} * [[Tajihi no Shima]]** Younger brother: {{ill|Tajihi no Mikemaro|ja|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ...5 KB (661 words) - 06:00, 23 2025 * [[Isonokami no Maro]] ...loss deeply, sending [[Prince Nagaya]]and {{Nihongo|Tajihi no Miyakemaro|'''多治比三宅麻呂'''}} on a condolence call to his home and granting him the posthumous Rank of ...7 KB (1,052 words) - 02:32, 16 2025 {{translated page|ja|多治比三宅麻呂|version=100045773|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Tajihi clan]] [[Category:Asuka period people]] [[Category:Nara period nobles]] [[Category:7th-century births]] [[Category:8th-century deaths]] [[Category:January]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[Category:Isonokami no Maro]] [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]]}} [[sn:Tajihi no Mikemaro]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]]

During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genshō|qq=}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō|qq=}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangi (Councilor)|qq=}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi clan|qq=}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara clan|qq=}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Shōmu|qq=}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya no Ōkimi|qq=}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Hiromaro|qq=}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinki|qq=}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka period|qq=}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara period|qq=}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Monmu|qq=}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genmei|qq=}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genshō|qq=}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi clan|qq=}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka period|qq=}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara period|qq=}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Province|qq=}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keiun|qq=}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keiun|qq=}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Monmu|qq=}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genmei|qq=}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wadō|qq=}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genshō|qq=}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō|qq=}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangi (Councilor)|qq=}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi clan|qq=}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara clan|qq=}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Shōmu|qq=}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya no Ōkimi|qq=}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Hiromaro|qq=}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinki|qq=}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka period|qq=}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara period|qq=}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Monmu|qq=}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genmei|qq=}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genshō|qq=}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi clan|qq=}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka period|qq=}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara period|qq=}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Province|qq=}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keiun|qq=}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keiun|qq=}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Monmu|qq=}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genmei|qq=}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wadō|qq=}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genshō|qq=}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō|qq=}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|1=Sangi (Japan)|lt=Sangi|2=ja|3=参議|4=ru|5=Санги|6=fr|7=Sangi_(Japon)|8=ko|9=참의_(일본사)|10=es|11=Sangi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangi (Councilor)|qq=}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi clan|qq=}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara clan|qq=}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Shōmu|qq=}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya no Ōkimi|qq=}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Hiromaro|qq=}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinki|qq=}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihō|qq=}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}} * Unknown: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Sadaichūben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaichūben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Middle Controller|ja|左中弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Middle Controller|qq=}})Based on the inscription of 『{{ill|Tako Monument|ja|多胡碑|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tako Monument|qq=}}』. * Wadō 4 (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * Wadō 6 {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka period|qq=}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara period|qq=}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Monmu|qq=}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genmei|qq=}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genshō|qq=}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi clan|qq=}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka period|qq=}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara period|qq=}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Province|qq=}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keiun|qq=}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keiun|qq=}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Monmu|qq=}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genmei|qq=}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wadō|qq=}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genshō|qq=}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō|qq=}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|1=Sangi (Japan)|lt=Sangi|2=ja|3=参議|4=ru|5=Санги|6=fr|7=Sangi_(Japon)|8=ko|9=참의_(일본사)|10=es|11=Sangi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangi (Councilor)|qq=}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi clan|qq=}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara clan|qq=}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Shōmu|qq=}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya no Ōkimi|qq=}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Hiromaro|qq=}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinki|qq=}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * {{ill|Taihō|ja|大宝|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihō|qq=}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint
