Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka period|qq=}} to early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara period|qq=}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|ja|摂津国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu Province|qq=}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keiun|qq=}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}}. In {{ill|Keiun|ja|慶雲|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keiun|qq=}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Monmu|qq=}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genmei|qq=}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wadō|qq=}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genshō|qq=}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōrō|qq=}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Councilor)|ja|参議|1=Sangi (Japan)|lt=Sangi|2=ja|3=参議|4=ru|5=Санги|6=fr|7=Sangi_(Japon)|8=ko|9=참의_(일본사)|10=es|11=Sangi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangi (Councilor)|qq=}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|ja|多治比氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi clan|qq=}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|ja|藤原氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara clan|qq=}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|ja|伊豆国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|qq=}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Shōmu|qq=}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Nagaya no Ōkimi|ja|長屋王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaya no Ōkimi|qq=}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hiromaro|ja|阿倍広庭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Hiromaro|qq=}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|太政官|1=Daijō-kan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-kan|qq=}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinki|qq=}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoku Nihongi|qq=}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit revision.comment: Bot: add category Category:多治比氏
revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth revision.comment: Bot: add category Category:People of Asuka-period Japan
revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Nara period nobles
revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, revision.comment: Merge [[Category:多治比氏]] into [[Category:Tajihi Clan]] via bot
revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} * Wadō 2 (709), 3rd Month, 23rd Day: Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without
