revision.comment: Merge [[Category:奈良時代の貴族]] into [[Category:Aristocrats of the Nara period]] via bot
revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q18339496]] Wikidata name: Tajihi no Miyakemaro [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, redirects to 従五位}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: (711), 4th Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|qid=Q106272496}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|qid=Q111305118}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|qid=Q11430835}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|qid=Q11430839}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q18339496]] Wikidata name: Tajihi no Miyakemaro [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=|1=Minbu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper revision.text:
{{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|qid=Q106272496}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|qid=Q111305118}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|qid=Q11430835}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|qid=Q11430839}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q18339496]] Wikidata name: Tajihi no Miyakemaro [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=|1=Minbu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|qid=Q106272496}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|qid=Q111305118}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|qid=Q11430835}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|qid=Q11430839}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q18339496]] Wikidata name: Tajihi no Miyakemaro [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=|1=Minbu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|qid=Q106272496}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|qid=Q111305118}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|qid=Q11430835}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|qid=Q11430839}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q18339496]] Wikidata name: Tajihi no Miyakemaro [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=|1=Minbu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, revision.text:
[[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|WD=Q106272496}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|WD=Q111305118}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|WD=Q11430835}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q18339496]] Wikidata name: Tajihi no Miyakemaro [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=|1=Minbu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth revision.text:
[[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|WD=Q106272496}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|WD=Q111305118}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|WD=Q11430835}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q18339496]] Wikidata name: Tajihi no Miyakemaro [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] - Early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]] → [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] | clan = [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] to early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of [[:en:Settsu Province|Settsu Province]], and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In [[:en:Keiun|Keiun]] 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Emperor Monmu]]. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]], he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|qq=|1=Minbu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as [[:en:Sangi (Japan)|Sangi]], meaning the [[:en:Tajihi clan|Tajihi clan]] had multiple members in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] council, similar to the [[:en:Fujiwara clan|Fujiwara clan]]. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in [[:en:Izu Province|Izu Province]] through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]].『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by [[:en:Prince Nagaya|Nagaya no Ōkimi]], who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally [[:en:Abe no Hironiwa|Abe no Hiromaro]], thereby consolidating power in the [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]].{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|qq=|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『[[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * [[:en:Taiho|Taihō]] 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|qq=|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|qq=|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (for Emperor Monmu’s funeral) * Wadō 1 (708), 2nd Month, 11th Day: {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|qq=|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} * Wadō 2 (709),
