[[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|WD=Q106272496}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|WD=Q111305118}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|WD=Q11430835}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q18339496]] Wikidata name: Tajihi no Miyakemaro [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period}} to early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|en|Settsu Province|WD=Q864163|lt=Settsu Province}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|1=Minbu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|WD=Q1133663|lt=Sangi}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|en|Fujiwara clan|WD=Q641628|lt=Fujiwara clan}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|en|Izu Province|WD=Q860928|lt=Izu Province}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Prince Nagaya|en|Prince Nagaya|WD=Q1963492|lt=Nagaya no Ōkimi}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hironiwa|en|Abe no Hironiwa|WD=Q11657244|lt=Abe no Hiromaro}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|WD=Q106272496}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|WD=Q111305118}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|WD=Q11430835}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839}}}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period}} to early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|en|Settsu Province|WD=Q864163|lt=Settsu Province}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|1=Minbu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|WD=Q1133663|lt=Sangi}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|en|Fujiwara clan|WD=Q641628|lt=Fujiwara clan}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|en|Izu Province|WD=Q860928|lt=Izu Province}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Prince Nagaya|en|Prince Nagaya|WD=Q1963492|lt=Nagaya no Ōkimi}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hironiwa|en|Abe no Hironiwa|WD=Q11657244|lt=Abe no Hiromaro}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == revision.text:
[[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|WD=Q106272496}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|WD=Q111305118}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|WD=Q11430835}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839}}}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period}} to early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|en|Settsu Province|WD=Q864163|lt=Settsu Province}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|1=Goshōzokushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|1=Mint Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|1=Minbu-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|WD=Q1133663|lt=Sangi}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|en|Fujiwara clan|WD=Q641628|lt=Fujiwara clan}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|en|Izu Province|WD=Q860928|lt=Izu Province}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Prince Nagaya|en|Prince Nagaya|WD=Q1963492|lt=Nagaya no Ōkimi}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hironiwa|en|Abe no Hironiwa|WD=Q11657244|lt=Abe no Hiromaro}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Taihō}} 3 (703), 1st Month, 2nd Day: {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|1=Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} * Taihō 4 (704), 1st Month, 7th Day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * Keiun 4 (707), 10th Month, 3rd Day: [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|WD=Q106272496|1=Tajihi no Koō}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|WD=Q111305118|1=Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|WD=Q11430835|1=Tajihi no Shima}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|1=Tajihi clan}}}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period|1=Asuka period}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan|1=Tajihi clan}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period|1=Asuka period}} to early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|en|Settsu Province|WD=Q864163|lt=Settsu Province|1=Settsu Province}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|1=Q97210018|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|1=Q11626688|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|1=Q11650312|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|1=Q11547969|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|WD=Q1133663|lt=Sangi|1=Sangi (Japan)}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan|1=Tajihi clan}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|en|Fujiwara clan|WD=Q641628|lt=Fujiwara clan|1=Fujiwara clan}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|en|Izu Province|WD=Q860928|lt=Izu Province|1=Izu Province}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Emperor Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi|1=Shoku Nihongi}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Prince Nagaya|en|Prince Nagaya|WD=Q1963492|lt=Nagaya no Ōkimi|1=Prince Nagaya}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hironiwa|en|Abe no Hironiwa|WD=Q11657244|lt=Abe no Hiromaro|1=Abe no Hironiwa}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki|1=Jinki (era)}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi|1=Shoku Nihongi}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (skipped Ranks) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period|1=Asuka period}} to early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|en|Settsu Province|WD=Q864163|lt=Settsu Province|1=Settsu Province}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|1=Q97210018|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|1=Q11626688|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|1=Q11650312|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|1=Q11547969|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|WD=Q1133663|lt=Sangi|1=Sangi (Japan)}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan|1=Tajihi clan}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|en|Fujiwara clan|WD=Q641628|lt=Fujiwara clan|1=Fujiwara clan}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|en|Izu Province|WD=Q860928|lt=Izu Province|1=Izu Province}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Emperor Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi|1=Shoku Nihongi}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Prince Nagaya|en|Prince Nagaya|WD=Q1963492|lt=Nagaya no Ōkimi|1=Prince Nagaya}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hironiwa|en|Abe no Hironiwa|WD=Q11657244|lt=Abe no Hiromaro|1=Abe no Hironiwa}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki|1=Jinki (era)}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] [[ja:多治比三宅麻呂]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0650|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}|father={{ill|Tajihi no Koō|WD=Q106272496|1=Tajihi no Koō}}|mother={{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter|WD=Q111305118|1=Ōtomo no Hirafu's daughter}}|relatives={{ill|Tajihi no Shima|WD=Q11430835|1=Tajihi no Shima}}|family={{ill|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|1=Tajihi clan}}}} {{Infobox noble | name = Tajihi no Miyake Maro (多治比三宅麻呂) | image = | caption = | era = Late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period|1=Asuka period}} - Early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | Rank = {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} • {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}) | ruler = {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}} → {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}} | clan = {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan|1=Tajihi clan}} (Initially Tajihi no Kimiko (公), later Tajihi no Mahito (真人)) | parents = Father: {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (丹比麻呂)
Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja|大伴比羅夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Hirafu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | siblings = {{ill|Tajihi no Shima|ja|多治比嶋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Shima|qq=}}, '''Miyake Maro''', and Hiyabe | spouse = | children = | special_notes = }} '''Tajihi no Miyake Maro''' (多治比三宅麻呂) was a noble of late {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period|1=Asuka period}} to early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. He was the son of {{ill|Tajihi no Koō|ja|多治比古王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajihi no Koō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the governor of {{ill|Settsu Province|en|Settsu Province|WD=Q864163|lt=Settsu Province|1=Settsu Province}}, and held the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} and the position of {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} ({{ill|Left Major Controller|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Left Major Controller|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}). == Career == After serving as a {{ill|Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|ja|巡察使 (古代日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsandō Circuit Inspector|1=Q97210018|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97210018}} (巡察使), he was promoted in {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} 1 (704) from {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} by three levels to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|WD=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} 4 (707), he was assigned as {{ill|Goshōzokushi|ja|装束司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshōzokushi|1=Q11626688|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11626688}} (御装束司) following the death of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, he was appointed to the newly established {{ill|Mint Bureau|ja|鋳銭司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mint Bureau|1=Q11650312|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650312}} and the {{ill|Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja|造雑物法用司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zaōzatsumotsuhōyōshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He continued to advance, reaching {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 4 (711) and {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} in Wadō 6 (713) while serving in the {{ill|Controller's Office|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Controller's Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}}. By the end of Empress Genmei's reign, in Wadō 8 (715), he attained {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and was appointed {{ill|Sadaiben|ja|左大弁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sadaiben|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁官|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=benkan|WD=Q3270768}}. During the reign of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}, he held the positions of {{ill|Minbu-kyō|ja|民部卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minbu-kyō|1=Q11547969|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547969}} and {{ill|Kawachi Province Inspector|ja|河内国按察使 (日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Province Inspector|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. He was promoted to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|ja|正四位下|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Lower|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 3 (719) and to {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|ja|正四位上|1=Senior Fourth Rank|lt=Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank, Upper|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位}} in Yōrō 5 (721). It is believed that in the same year, he was appointed as {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|WD=Q1133663|lt=Sangi|1=Sangi (Japan)}}, meaning the {{ill|Tajihi clan|en|Tajihi clan|WD=Q11430839|lt=Tajihi clan|1=Tajihi clan}} had multiple members in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}} council, similar to the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|en|Fujiwara clan|WD=Q641628|lt=Fujiwara clan|1=Fujiwara clan}}. However, in Yōrō 6 (722), he was accused of treason and sentenced to death. His execution was reduced to exile in {{ill|Izu Province|en|Izu Province|WD=Q860928|lt=Izu Province|1=Izu Province}} through the petition of {{ill|Prince Obito|ja|首皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Obito|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 聖武天皇|1=Emperor Shōmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q349263}}, the future {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}.『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi|1=Shoku Nihongi}}』Yōrō 6, 1st Month, 20th Day entry Some theories suggest that this was a political maneuver by {{ill|Prince Nagaya|en|Prince Nagaya|WD=Q1963492|lt=Nagaya no Ōkimi|1=Prince Nagaya}}, who opposed the {{ill|Fujiwara Four Brothers|ja|藤原四兄弟|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Four Brothers|qq=}}, to replace Miyake Maro with his ally {{ill|Abe no Hironiwa|en|Abe no Hironiwa|WD=Q11657244|lt=Abe no Hiromaro|1=Abe no Hironiwa}}, thereby consolidating power in the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}}.{{ill|Kimoto Yoshinobu|ja|木本好信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimoto Yoshinobu|1=Yoshinobu Kimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518614}}, "On the Early Life of Fujiwara no Maro: Before the Nagaya no Hen Incident", {{ill|Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja|甲子園短期大学紀要|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshien Junior College Bulletin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, No. 28, March 2010. {{CRID|1390852193460906624}}. According to one account, he passed away in exile on the 22nd day of the 6th month of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki|1=Jinki (era)}} 2 (725) at the age of 73.『皇胤志』 == Official Ranks == (Note: Information without citations is based on 『{{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi|1=Shoku Nihongi}}』.) * Unknown: {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank,
